No Poverty.reason: The 'Principle of Tax Fairness' (租稅公平原則) directly supports Target 1.b by enabling the design of progressive tax systems and pro-poor policy frameworks, making this an inferred but relevant connection.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus linking taxation law to zero hunger.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: Taxation is the primary mechanism for funding public services, including health systems (Target 3.c). This is an indirect but valid link to the course's subject.

Quality Education.reason: While the course is educational, SDG 4 refers to the provision of education systems. Taxation (租稅法) is the funding mechanism for public education, providing an indirect link.

Gender Equality.reason: The 'Principle of Tax Fairness' (租稅公平原則) can be applied to design tax laws that promote gender equality and non-discrimination, linking to Target 5.c.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: There is no direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus linking taxation law to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: There is no direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus linking taxation law to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: A stable and fair tax system, as discussed in the course, is foundational for economic growth (Target 8.1) and supports productive activities and decent job creation (Target 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Tax revenue, governed by tax law, is the primary source of funding for public infrastructure development (Target 9.1), establishing an indirect link.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course explicitly covers 'Principle of Tax Fairness' (租稅公平原則) and 'Taxation and Effective Protection of Basic Rights' (租稅課徵與基本權有效保障), directly addressing fiscal policies for equality (Target 10.4).
evidence: 租稅課徵與基本權有效保障

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: There is no direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus linking taxation law to sustainable cities and communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: There is no direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus linking taxation law to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: There is no direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus linking taxation law to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: There is no direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus linking taxation law to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: There is no direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus linking taxation law to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about the rule of law in taxation ('租稅法律主義'), administrative procedures, and remedies ('租稅救濟'), directly supporting Target 16.3 (rule of law) and 16.6 (accountable institutions).
evidence: 確保相關公權力行為之合法性

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly enhances domestic capacity for tax collection ('合法的稽徵工作'), which is the core focus of Target 17.1 (strengthen domestic resource mobilization).
evidence: 有助於進行合法的稽徵工作
